speaker: Narrator
text:
The arrangement had been a major success. The worm and Christina had learned to appreciate the intimacy that only those who shared a body could know. 
	
	The worm accepted the name Pasaya and grew to love the role that was chosen for her, internalizing aspects of it. The confidence of a queen. 
	
	Christina realized the power of a secondary immune system capable of detecting any illness in her body and acting accordingly. 
	
	Pasaya had integrated herself to the degree where Pasaya could even eat for her.

speaker: Narrator
text: Was it love?

speaker: Pasaya
text: C-Could I try something just for me this time?

speaker: Christina
text: Just stay in character.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Now that you've become my helpless drone.

speaker: Pasaya
text: You have become vulnerable to my infectious kiss!

speaker: Pasaya
text: Your body will receive my eggs through my deep kissing!

speaker: Pasaya
text: Muahahah.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Christina feels Pasaya's oviposition tube slither its way from her cunt's entrance, between her breasts, and into her mouth. 
	
	It still tastes of her own juice, something that she's grown eminently fond of, as if she was tonguing her own body over and over again. 
	
	Then the fun part. The malformed eggs coated in the fluids from inside the worm's body, like boba tea going down a straw. 
	
	She felt every wet lump drip down her throat with the pulsations of Pasaya's tongue.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Oh!

speaker: Narrator
text: Pasaya had over done it. Christina had prematurely relived herself.

speaker: Christina
text: Oh no the chair...

speaker: Pasaya
text: Nobody's going to know.

speaker: Pasaya
text: I'll make some brunch, just the way you like it.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Pasaya had insisted that she save money by repurposing the carefully prepared sacks of compost left out by their neighbors. 
	
	With some debate, Christina allowed Pasaya to take whatever action was necessary when she was unconscious as long as she didn't wake up to the specific taste of garbage.

speaker: Pasaya
text: It's wonderful.

speaker: Narrator
text:
The worm slithers out of Christina
	
	's mouth. Its sliding motion still makes Christina gag a little, so the worm takes extra steps to manipulate the trachea for Christina's breathing.

speaker: Pasaya
text: I almost forgot!

speaker: Pasaya
text: What do you want it to taste like?

speaker: Christina
text: The Saltlakrits papa gave me when I broke my arm in 5th grade.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Okay.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Would you rather see Pasaya do this or "the worm"?

speaker: Christina
text: This is for you.

speaker: Christina
text: Who do you want to be seen as?

speaker: Narrator
text:
Pasaya's worm mouth snaked its way down into the foul bog. She sucked her meal up happily, something even Christina could feel with their newfound connection. 
	It was something she had grown to appreciate about their arrangement.

speaker: Narrator
text:
When Pasaya finished, she had taken up the habit of mimicking the gasp of a human as a sign of satisfaction. 
	
	Working her way back up into Christina she dripped some of the stew onto her host's tongue for her benefit as well. 
	
	It was just as promised: The salted licorice her father had given her as a young girl, brought all the way from the city after she had broken her arm pounding another girl into the asphalt. 
	
	The taste of salt and the taste of victory.

speaker: Narrator
text: The two savored their time together.
